Sentinel-Core\n","createdAtIso":"2026-03-15T01:17:51.285Z","lastInteractedAtIso":"2026-03-15T01:39:00.489Z","chatHistory":[{"request_id":"d0bdbe1b-4a0f-45b8-b1b0-902154f8d0c5","uuid":"ee72f113-1115-45c1-bb67-ba715191a453","chatItemType":"agentic-checkpoint-delimiter","status":"success","fromTimestamp":0,"toTimestamp":1773537471290},{"chatItemType":"exchange-pointer","exchangeUuid":"d1dd6889-10e2-462b-bf85-290953cca39d","timestamp":"2026-03-15T01:19:40.635Z","request_message":"analise a documentação do nosso Sentinel-Core não implemente nada sem a minha solicitação apena me diga se faz sentido a proposta do projeto.","status":"success","seen_state":"unseen"},{"chatItemType":"exchange-pointer","exchangeUuid":"f5e14dc0-6126-43e6-b1bb-f8031a020e1d","timestamp":"2026-03-15T01:19:47.017Z","request_message":"","status":"success","seen_state":"unseen"},{"chatItemType":"exchange-pointer","exchangeUuid":"d904840b-7826-41e6-b8fa-3f7d3f8f7c87","timestamp":"2026-03-15T01:19:53.520Z","request_message":"","status":"success","seen_state":"unseen"},{"chatItemType":"exchange-pointer","exchangeUuid":"1066b70f-64b3-406d-a883-e1016dab6885","timestamp":"2026-03-15T01:25:57.423Z","request_message":"faça uma análise mais crítica e objetiva dos pontos contraditórios ou ambíguos entre os documentos, sem implementar nada.","status":"success","seen_state":"unseen"},{"chatItemType":"exchange-pointer","exchangeUuid":"1dc1cba5-f2eb-43dc-967c-26011095488b","timestamp":"2026-03-15T01:26:04.217Z","request_message":"","status":"success","seen_state":"unseen"},{"chatItemType":"exchange-pointer","exchangeUuid":"be7e253f-9c2f-4f7b-a29a-dc80d8f985bc","timestamp":"2026-03-15T01:30:33.134Z","request_message":"faz
